questions.text:
Fill in the blank:
Benefit of the 2-way match configuration, is to not block payments due to missing "____"
The purpose of 2-way match is to help Accountant in the monthly reconciliation
2-Way match is used when a purchasing category  (taxes, insurances, electricity, water, etc.) is considered at "____" risk
What is the Requester's role in terms of purchase requisitions?
options: To Approve, Reject or ask for the Rework of the Purchase Requisition
To create purchase requisitions, follow-on documents (such as goods receipts and return deliveries) and monitor the overall PR/PO process

questions.text: A purchase order (PO) is a formal order and legally binding agreement with a supplier to have services or items furnished to L'Oréal
What is the PRIMARY responsibility of the Accounts Payable Manager (BEST P2P Manager) regarding 2-way match configurations according to Control LoC1?
options: To implement and test any required changes to the 2-way match settings.
To approve or reject all requests to add or remove vendors from the authorized list.
To perform an annual review of the configured company codes, vendors, and material groups for 2-way match and validate it with the CFO.
To investigate and resolve any discrepancies or errors identified through the 2-way match process.
